description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/limitland/flatbedcursors/xcursorgen Docker image and defines two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build-distribution job that runs echo "Building...", mkdir -p /root/rpmbuild/{BUILD,RPMS,SOURCES,SPECS,SRPMS,RPMS/noarch}, export RPMDIR=/root/rpmbuild, ./build-distribution, and cp ./deployment/index.html ./dist, then stores the dist directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs echo "Deploying to public pages...", mkdir -p ./public, rm -rf ./public/FlatbedCursors-*, cp ./dist/* ./public/, publishes the public directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
